project.title: FileCabinet
project.description: Local-first Windows desktop vault for retaining, cataloging, previewing, verifying, and recovering high-signal technical artifacts.

produces: docs/FileCabinet v1.6.0 — Health and Settings Release.md
docs/FileCabinet v1.7.0 — Vault Health and Iconography Release.md
consumes: User-selected files and folders for vault ingestion
Existing vault item files during rescan

pgp.detail: v1.7.1 installer validation has not generated a detached PGP signature.

datasets.name: FileCabinet catalog
datasets.description: Local JSON catalog containing vault metadata, artifact records, tags, categories, hashes, extracted text paths, thumbnail paths, activities, and UI preferences.

datasets.name: FileCabinet vault
datasets.description: Portable retained artifact storage containing items, thumbnails, extracted text, quarantine, and exports.

scripts.name: installer/build-installer.ps1
scripts.role: Publishes the self-contained Windows x64 build and creates the WiX MSI installer.

automation.build: dotnet test FileCabinet.Tests/FileCabinet.Tests.vbproj; installer/build-installer.ps1 -Version 1.7.1.0; release-hasher hash artifacts/installer/FileCabinet-1.7.1.0-win-x64.msi; release-hasher sign-pq artifacts/installer/FileCabinet-1.7.1.0-win-x64.msi --key D:/200-CTS/230-HASHING/ReleaseHasher/mykey.sec
automation.deploy: Publish artifacts/installer/FileCabinet-1.7.1.0-win-x64.msi and artifacts/installer/FileCabinet-1.7.1.0-win-x64.pq.sig to the GitHub v1.7.1 release.
tasks: Build self-contained Windows x64 publish output
Include release notes from docs/FileCabinet v1.7.1 — Hash Compatibility Patch.md
Sign release artifact with ReleaseHasher PQ key

theme.name: Aptlantis Studio - Neon Ink
principles: Cyan and teal for navigation, focus, and structure
Violet and purple for ingest, preview, process, and pipeline states
Pink and magenta for featured, creative, and metadata emphasis
Green, yellow, red, and orange reserved for health, attention, risk, and build/file-operation states

current_highlights: Neon Ink theme resources now live in a dedicated WPF ResourceDictionary
MainWindow uses shared theme brushes instead of inline palette resources
Cyan navigation fills were darkened for readable selected-row and route text
Violet, purple, pink, magenta, orange, green, yellow, and red semantic accents are used across process, preview, metadata, build, health, attention, and risk states
Preview and activity accents were refreshed to match Neon Ink semantics
Application and installer icon assets were refreshed from the new FileCabinet logo mark
Application, CLI, and manifest version updated to 1.7.1
Added 24 optional compatibility hashes and checksums across archival, legacy, and fast hash families
New non-legacy hash values are stored in the extensible artifact hashes dictionary
Active hash computation now respects Settings across ingest, health, repair, rescan, and headless paths
Details shows dynamic hash rows for all supported algorithms
Vault Health promoted to a right-panel tab with findings, repair candidates, progress, actions, and repair history
Material Symbols source vocabulary mapped to category-specific artifact list and preview icons
Borderless maximize now respects the Windows taskbar work area
Release verification references ARHS at D:/010-CITY-HALL/ARHS and ReleaseHasher at D:/200-CTS/230-HASHING/ReleaseHasher
FileCabinet-1.7.1.0-win-x64.msi build, ARHS hash, and PQ signing are pending
not_in_scope: Destructive cleanup of orphan generated assets
design_boundaries: Repairable local vault state over cloud dependency
notes.last_verified: dotnet test FileCabinet.Tests/FileCabinet.Tests.vbproj --no-restore passed 98 tests on 2026-06-11; installer build, ReleaseHasher hash, and sign-pq pending for 1.7.1
